role: Preprocess ancient sequencing reads for PanGenie and graph-based genotyping.
primary_outputs: Prepared FASTQ files for downstream genotyping.

role: Format introgression-tract intervals before graph-coordinate liftover.
primary_inputs: Introgression interval table; valid sample/path IDs.

role: Lift introgression intervals using PAF alignments between linear reference and graph/sample paths.
primary_inputs: PAF alignment file; formatted introgression intervals.
primary_outputs: Lifted BED-like intervals plus optional rejected/stats tables.

role: Inject lifted introgression intervals into an ODGI graph to align node boundaries to tract boundaries.
primary_inputs: Input OG graph; lifted introgression BED; optional ODGI container.

role: Remove injected introgression paths and build boundary-aware graph indexes for WDL genotyping.
primary_inputs: Introgression-injected OG graph; optional ODGI/VG containers.
primary_outputs: Cleaned OG graph plus GBZ, RI, HAPL, snarls, distance, XG, GFA, and optional surjection path list.

role: Main tract-first, graph-aware PanArchaic indel/SV workflow.
primary_inputs: Ancient reads; pangenome graph/index files; injected ODGI graph; reference FASTA/index; container images; helper scripts.
primary_outputs: Deconstruct VCF, PanGenie VCF, merged VCF, introgressed path list, and strict introgressed indel/SV VCF.

role: Merge deconstruct variant records with PanGenie genotype fields.
primary_inputs: Deconstruct VCF; PanGenie VCF; sample name.

role: Trace genotype-supported variant alleles through introgressed ODGI graph paths.
primary_inputs: ODGI container/image; injected OG graph; merged VCF; introgressed path list; sample name.
primary_outputs: Introgressed event VCFs and node-to-path mapping.

role: Standardize retained VCF records for annotation and final event counting.
primary_outputs: Preprocessed VCF with stable IDs and standardized SV annotations.
